thread.question: what is the email open rate

text.value: what is the email open rate

The query to retrieve the overall email open rate for 2025 was unsuccessful due to a technical error in the data model—specifically, duplicate send_id values in the marketing_events table. As a result, I cannot provide the actual open rate figure at this time.

Limitations:
- The actual open rate data could not be retrieved due to technical issues.
- No fabricated or estimated figures are provided, in line with data integrity guidelines.

Next steps:
- I recommend investigating and resolving the duplicate send_id issue in the marketing_events table so that accurate open rate reporting can be enabled.
- Once resolved, please re-ask your question or reach out for further KPI analysis.

Reminder: All data in this environment is synthetic/fictitious and used for illustrative purposes only.

All attempts to generate and execute code failed after reaching maximum retries.

The first code candidate tried was:
```dax
// Overall email open rate for the full year 2025
EVALUATE
  ROW(
    "Open Rate % 2025",
    CALCULATE(
      [Open Rate %],
      YEAR('marketing_events'[event_at]) == 2025
    )
  )
```
